rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying contradictions and unsupported claims.
rationale.R1.4: The agent did not map against prior works but discussed performance deltas across datasets.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for several claims and provided specific feedback on missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; the agent helped avoid potential harms by pointing out unsupported claims.
